form.formComment: Resuming after a three months break. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Windsor in the G2 Lightning Novices' Chase January 16 over 3200m, slow track; 30 len behind No Questions Asked with 72kg at $5. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 3.5 len win. Uttoxeter October 5 over 3200m defeating Country Mile carrying 72kg at $3.50. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Comes off a 31 day let-up. Last run finished 12th of 20 runners at Cheltenham on March 11 over 3200m, 24 len behind Martator with 72.5kg at $4.30. Race before finished second in a small field at Windsor in the G2 Lightning Novices' Chase on January 16 over 3200m, on slow going 1.0 len behind No Questions Asked carrying 71kg at $1.50. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Freshened for 42 days. Last outing to post a big 17 len win. Doncaster on February 28 over 3300m slow track defeating Queens Gamble with 72.5kg at $2.60 in a steeplechase. Race before to post a big 8 len win. Doncaster on January 24 over 3300m slow track defeating Grain D'oudairies carrying 70kg at $2.20 in a steeplechase. Dangerous.

form.formComment: Useful type. Resumes off a 45 day letup. May struggle.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 32 day letup. Last start finished 17th of 23 runners at Cheltenham on March 10 over 4000m, 34 len behind Madara carrying 74kg at $10. The start before that; raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 1.0 len Windsor in a G2 Lightning Novices' Chase on January 16 over 3200m slow going defeating Be Aware carrying 71kg at $4.50 in a jumps. Consider.
